claims.summary: Missing resonance telemetry must remain distinguishable from a measured zero value.
claims.disposition: verify field-presence receipt and compatibility projection behavior

claims.summary: The exact 0.04 resonance threshold needs floating-point-stable classification.
claims.disposition: verify epsilon-aware threshold comparisons and exact-boundary tests

claims.summary: A packet arriving at 4999 milliseconds should remain within the current freshness boundary.
claims.disposition: verify exact 4999 millisecond late-packet regression coverage

claims.summary: Reconnects must not let a previous connection's active packet identity contaminate the new stream.
claims.disposition: verify first-valid-packet reset of active source identity and unsupported-major retention
